problem id: 37664f79
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  00000111 -> 00100000
  01010000 -> 00000000
  01001101 -> 00101001
  01100101 -> 00101000
  01010111 -> 10101000
  11110101 -> 10101010
  11000010 -> 00010000
  00011110 -> 11000000
  00111110 -> 11000000
  11010001 -> 00001010

query: 11010111
predicted answer: 10111010
